taskInputPrompt: What should the next pi-session-handover agent continue?
agentInstructions: Close the current pi-session-handover turn according to this repository's handover rules before calling handover_complete. Prefer small, verified, committed slices.
nextPromptInstructions: Write a self-contained prompt for a fresh agent. Include the goal, current branch/commit, relevant plan file, changed files, validation results, risks, and the exact next implementation slice. Mention that this repo uses pi-session-handover and that /handover settings should eventually showcase the settings UI being implemented.

promptContextFields.name: plan
promptContextFields.label: Plan file
promptContextFields.prompt: Which plan or issue should the next agent follow?

promptContextFields.name: next_slice
promptContextFields.label: Next slice
promptContextFields.prompt: What is the exact next implementation slice?

promptContextFields.name: validation
promptContextFields.label: Validation
promptContextFields.prompt: What validation has been run, and what still needs to be run?
promptContextFields.default: Run npm run ci before handover.

promptContextFields.name: risk
promptContextFields.label: Known risk
promptContextFields.prompt: What risk or caveat should the next agent keep in mind?
promptContextFields.default: Do not break existing /handover, /handover auto, /handover status, or /handover-continue behavior.

completionSteps.name: Verify
completionSteps.description: Run npm run ci successfully, or document exactly why it could not be run.

completionSteps.name: Commit
completionSteps.description: Commit the completed slice with a concise message.

completionSteps.name: Publish
completionSteps.description: Push main to both origin and upstream when network access is available and the user expects the work published.

completionSteps.name: Handover summary
completionSteps.description: Summarize changed files, validation, commit hash, remaining risks, and the next slice.
